s: In 1986, Juan Nieves suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.920, WHIP 1.630, SO 116, WAR 2.500.
In 1987, Juan Nieves suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.880, WHIP 1.530, SO 163, WAR 2.500.
In 1988, Juan Nieves suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.070, WHIP 1.210, SO 73, WAR 0.500.
